name: Dilled Potato-Apple Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup (1/2 inch pieces) Diagonal cut Snow Peas
1 medium Unpeeled Red Apple, Cut Into Thin Slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine potatoes and 2 cups of water in a medium saucepan; bring to a boil.
2. Cover the saucepan, reduce heat and simmer for 15 minutes or until tender. Drain and let cool; peel and cut into 1/4 inch slices. Set aside.
3. Cook snow peas in a small amount of boiling water for 15 seconds; drain.
4. Rinse under cold running water; drain well.
5. Combine potatoes, snow peas, celery, green onions, and apple slices in a medium bowl. Toss well.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the remaining 1 tablespoon of water, vinegar, oil, dillweed, sugar, and salt. Add to potato mixture, tossing gently to coat.
7. Cover and chill salad for 1 hour. (Fat 3.6, Chol. 0.)
